# model: "Claude Sonnet 4.5 (copilot)"    # Optional: pin a specific model for this agent (format: "Model Name (vendor)")
# tools: ['read', 'search']   # Optional: unset = all tools. [] = no tools.
#                             # Available aliases: execute, read, edit, search, web, agent/runSubagent, todo
# disable-model-invocation: false  # Optional: true = manual selection only (not auto-invoked)
# user-invocable: true        # Optional: false = programmatic/subagent use only
